description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:latest Docker image and defines a PIP_CACHE_DIR variable pointing to .cache/pip. In a global before_script run python -V, install virtualenv via pip, create a virtual environment in a venv directory and activate it. Cache both the pip cache directory (.cache/pip) and the virtual environment (venv/). Add a test job (default test stage) named test that installs development dependencies with pip install -r requirements_dev.txt and then runs pytest. The pipeline should execute on every pipeline run.
